pages.text: $(bold)Mega Jungle Seed$()$(br2)The colossal jungle tree. Only the 2x2 megaflora drops it.
pages.title: Mega Jungle Seed

pages.text: $(bold)Grows:$() plant in a 2×2 to raise a giant jungle tree.$(br2)$(bold)No conversion recipe$() — this seed falls only from a fully-grown mega jungle tree.
pages.title: Planting & Catalyst
